app.title: Useful Utilities Collection
app.tray_message_body: Into the shadows! Don't worry, I'm secretly on guard duty. 😉
app.confirm_exit_body: The Mic Guard is currently active. Your microphone won't be watched anymore if you close. Quit anyway?
app.guard_active_startup_body: Your microphone volume is being kept at the target level.
app.instance_already_running: UUC is already running — bringing it to the front.
app.alt_f4_terminated_body: The application was closed directly and is no longer running in the background.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.page_subtitle: A quick look at what's going on right now.
dashboard.keyboard_card_desc: Shows whether the keyboard is currently locked.
dashboard.mouse_card_desc: Shows whether the mouse is currently locked.
dashboard.microphone_card_desc: Protection status of your Windows microphone.
dashboard.guard_text_unavailable: No microphone found — please check your setup.

input_lock.title: Input Lock
input_lock.page_subtitle: Lock keyboard or mouse individually — or start a timed lock for both.
input_lock.status_hint_both: Keyboard & Mouse are locked by the timer.
input_lock.status_emergency_disabled: Keyboard & Mouse are locked during timed lock.
input_lock.keyboard_hint: Blocks all keyboard input (e.g. for cleaning your keyboard.)
input_lock.mouse_hint: Blocks mouse movement and clicks (e.g. for cleaning your mouse).
input_lock.countdown_help: Locks both keyboard and mouse for the selected duration.
input_lock.countdown_warning_title: ⚠️ WARNING: Keyboard & Mouse will be locked!
input_lock.countdown_warning_text: While the timer is running, keyboard and mouse are completely locked.
input_lock.countdown_emergency_hint: Keyboard & Mouse remain locked until the timer expires.
input_lock.countdown_unlock_instructions: To end the lock early: press Ctrl+Alt+Delete and end the application via Task Manager.

microphone_guard.title: Mic Guard
microphone_guard.page_subtitle: Keeps your microphone volume locked at the level you set — automatically.
microphone_guard.status_desc_active: Your microphone is being held at the target level.
microphone_guard.status_desc_inactive: Target level is saved, but the guard isn't running yet.
microphone_guard.status_desc_unavailable: No recording device could be found.
microphone_guard.mics_hint: Click a mic to select it · Click again to toggle guard on/off
microphone_guard.activity_desc: The guard keeps an eye on your microphone and fixes the volume if another app changes it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.page_subtitle: Tweak the app to your liking.
settings.shortcut_hint: Emergency escape for both keyboard and mouse. Just click the box and press the keys you want.
settings.notify_on_correction_checkbox: Show notification when microphone volume is corrected
settings.notify_on_minimize_checkbox: Show notification when minimized to tray

about.title: About
about.page_subtitle: Here you'll find all the build and license details for this app.
about.oss_title: Open Source · Do whatever you like
about.oss_body: This app is open source and released under the MIT license. Feel free to read the code, fork it, and tweak it to your needs.
